speakers.name: R.K. Tyagi
direct_answers: Yes, it is already under -- RFP has already been issued and bids are likely to be submitted very soon.
Yes. It is not NCT cost. It is our internal cost, at which we have awarded the projects.
dodged_or_vague: So as of now, there is no clear visibility. Maybe in quarter 2, there will be some clear visibility by Government of India.
speakers.summary: R.K. Tyagi, the Chairman and Managing Director of Power Grid Corporation, delivered a confident and comprehensive presentation on the company's financial results and strategic outlook. He highlighted the company's achievements in project management, including the commissioning of digital substations and the use of advanced technologies for tower erection. Tyagi emphasized the company's strong market position and its role in India's power transmission network. He addressed questions on project delays and cost estimates, providing direct answers on some aspects while remaining vague on others. Overall, Tyagi's tone was optimistic, focusing on growth and operational excellence.

speakers.name: Satyaprakash Dash
speakers.summary: Satyaprakash Dash, the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, played a neutral role in the earnings call, primarily focusing on introducing the senior management team and facilitating the conference proceedings. He welcomed the participants and set the stage for the discussions on the company's business and performance outlook. Dash's contributions were procedural, ensuring a smooth transition between speakers and maintaining the flow of the meeting.

speakers.name: Vishal Periwal
speakers.summary: Vishal Periwal, serving as the moderator from Antique Stock Broking, maintained a neutral tone throughout the call. He introduced the webinar, outlined the agenda, and facilitated the transition to the company secretary for further proceedings. Periwal's role was primarily to ensure the smooth operation of the call, including the introduction of the Q&A session, without delving into the specifics of the company's performance or strategy.

Satyaprakash Dash facilitated the proceedings, introducing the management team and ensuring the call's structure.
